2025-10-12T18:06:35.5492312Z hint: is subject to change. To configure the initial branch name to use in all

2025-10-12T18:06:35.5499085Z hint:
2025-10-12T18:06:35.5501882Z hint: 	git config --global init.defaultBranch <name>

2025-10-12T18:06:35.5514964Z hint:
2025-10-12T18:06:35.5516192Z hint: 	git branch -m <name>
